title: Profile Summary
content: Galymzhan Yessimbek is an AI/LLM-oriented full-stack developer with education in Cyberphysics and Applied Finance / Financial Analytics.

title: PBI Monitor
content: PBI Monitor is a working desktop/internal automation application for daily Power BI dashboard refresh monitoring. It supports a business analytics workflow where dashboard update checks need to be repeatable, documented and easier to manage than manual inspection. It is positioned as a product-style internal tool with future potential for synchronization, notifications and reporting.

title: AbafarConvertor
content: AbafarConvertor is a YouTube-to-MP3 utility project with a Node/Express backend and an Expo/React Native client. The backend exposes video info and download endpoints, orchestrates yt-dlp conversion to MP3, sends the generated file to the client and removes the temporary file after download.

title: Current Experience: Bank CenterCredit
content: Galymzhan Yessimbek currently works at Bank CenterCredit as a Business Analyst. His work focuses on improving the virtual assistant Aibek, analyzing customer conversations, reviewing response logic and dialogue scenarios, identifying recurring customer questions and supporting the quality of digital customer support products.

title: Intern Developer: ARDFM
content: During his internship at the Agency of the Republic of Kazakhstan for Regulation and Development of Financial Market, Galymzhan developed a full-stack internal data catalog using Django/Python for the backend, Vue.js for the frontend and PostgreSQL for the database architecture.

title: Publication: CBDC article in Банки Казахстана №3, 2025
content: Galymzhan authored the article 'Цифровые валюты центральных банков (CBDC): эволюция, сравнительный анализ и перспективы для финансовых систем', published in Банки Казахстана №3, 2025. The article discusses CBDC evolution, design, operational challenges, privacy risks and implications for financial systems.

title: Certifications and Awards
content: Galymzhan has a Duolingo English Test certificate with an overall score of 115, CEFR B2. He completed the Computer Software Development program at IT STEP Computer Academy. He also won DLD Hackathon 2022 at KIMEP University with a solution for a MOST company case.
